title: Bilateral trade level comparison
description: Forecast whether total bilateral trade (imports plus exports, current USD) between two countries will be higher in a later year than at the as_of baseline year.
question_template: As of {as_of_year}, will {target} bilateral trade (imports plus exports, USD) be higher in {resolution_year} than in {as_of_year}?
limitations: Resolution sums UN Comtrade import and export rows for the reporter/partner pair from processed country metrics. MVP relationship coverage is limited; start with CHN_USA where bilateral rows exist.
